content.text:
Short answer: I couldn't find any CSV or File nodes in the FutuRe namespace.

What I checked
- Searched FutuRe (descendants) for File nodes and common CSV indicators — no matches.
- Found content nodes instead: Markdown (Mapping Rules), the FutuRe Group Annual Profitability Report, TransactionMapping/code nodes, LineOfBusiness nodes, etc.
- The Profitability report and its layout areas pull from a virtual data cube — the transformation is virtual at query time (so the underlying numeric data may live in external systems or a virtual cube, not as CSV files in the mesh).

Next steps — tell me which you want:
- I can display the Mapping Rules or the Annual Profitability Report visually now.
- Or I can run a targeted search for specific filenames or extensions (e.g., name:\*.csv or nodeType:File under a particular path).
Which would you like me to do?
